metadata.title: Custom App & Web Development Ireland | We Make IT
metadata.description: Turn your idea into an app or website. Irish-based, 15+ years experience, fixed price. Free first consultation.
metadata.ogTitle: Custom App & Web Development Ireland | We Make IT
metadata.ogDescription: Got a business idea? We help you validate it, plan it, and build it. Free first consultation.

hero.subtitle: Got a business idea? We turn it into a real app or website. One team, one price, no surprises.
hero.springSale: Spring Sale: 40% off for new clients. Limited spots available.

items.label: First Consultation. No Commitment.
items.ariaLabel: Free first consultation with no commitment required

items.label: Fixed Price. No Hidden Extras.
items.ariaLabel: One fixed price with no hidden extras

items.label: Based in Ireland, working globally
items.ariaLabel: Based in Ireland, working with clients globally

items.label: Three languages: English, Italian and Russian
items.ariaLabel: We work in three languages: English, Italian and Russian

services.heading: App and website development services for your business
services.subheading: From idea validation and prototyping, to mobile app development, web applications, localisation services, IT consulting, and ongoing support. Everything under one roof.

items.title: Custom App Development
items.description: We design and build custom applications tailored to exactly how your business works, for your success and your customers.

items.title: Idea Validation and MVP
items.description: Not sure if your idea will work? We help you validate it before spending a penny on a full build. We then create a Minimum Viable Product (MVP) so you can test it with real users fast.

items.title: UX Research
items.description: Already have a product or prototype? We help handling the research on how real people use your product, find what is confusing or broken, and give you a clear, prioritised list of improvements.

items.title: UX Design
items.description: Got a UX report? We turn findings into polished designs and, if needed, handle implementation too.

items.title: App Prototype
items.description: Before committing to a full build, we create an interactive prototype of your app. You can click through it, test it with users, and get investor feedback.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: We build mobile apps that work on both iOS and Android from a single codebase, keeping costs down without compromising on look or feel.

items.title: Web Application Development
items.description: Need something more powerful than a website? We build web apps: dashboards, booking systems, portals, marketplaces and more.

items.title: Accessibility Audits
items.description: EU law now requires digital products to be accessible to people with disabilities. We audit your existing app or website and fix what needs fixing.

items.title: Software Consultancy
items.description: Not sure what to build, which technology to choose, or whether your idea is viable? We are here to help.

items.title: Maintenance and Support
items.description: Already have an app that needs looking after? We take on ongoing support, fix bugs, add new features, and keep things running smoothly.

items.title: Website & App Localisation
items.description: We handle the full localisation of your website or app — from translating content into multiple languages to integrating i18n tokens in your codebase. Reach new audiences without the headache.

items.title: Multi-Market Product Development
items.description: Building a product for multiple markets? We design and develop online products localised for different regions, languages, and cultural expectations — so you can launch globally with confidence.

founder.opening: Like most users, my patience for clunky software is short. I believe every app should just make sense. Most still do not.
founder.name: My name is Lana.
founder.identity: Creative innovator, IT consultant, frontend developer and the founder of We Make IT.
founder.bio: I have over eight years in web development, focused on frontend engineering and accessible design. I am also a certified UX designer. I work with a team of full-stack engineers with over 15 years of experience.
founder.passion: Solving real problems and making life simpler is what drives me. I care deeply about accessible software. Everyone deserves a frustration-free digital experience. My mission is to help entrepreneurs build products their customers love.
founder.differenceHeading: So what makes our services different?
founder.differenceHighlight: A genuine interest in solving problems and accessibility-first approach.
founder.differenceText: If you have a problem, we find the solution. Clear and direct.
founder.quote: When your business solves a real problem for real people, that is where success begins.
founder.quoteFooter: And we know how to help you reach that point.
founder.callout: Share your idea below for a free quote.
founder.imgAlt: Lana, founder of We Make IT

about.body1: We Make IT is a software development studio based in Ireland. We help businesses and founders bring ideas to life, and offer consulting and support for existing projects.
about.body2: From your first question to launch and beyond, we are with you.
about.body3: Our team combines full-stack development, accessible design, UX, and business expertise. We have worked at large tech companies and bring that experience to small and medium-sized businesses.
about.tagline: Wherever you are, if you have an idea, we would love to hear it.
about.languageNote: By the way, we also speak

values.title: We Welcome Every Client
values.description: No idea is too small. Whether you are a startup founder, a business owner, or someone just exploring an idea, we are happy to talk. Free first consultation, no commitment required.

values.title: Big-Company Experience
values.description: Our team has 15+ years of experience building products at major tech companies. We bring that expertise and quality to every project, no matter the size.

values.title: Personal Attention, Every Step
values.description: You work directly with our team, not a sales rep or account manager. Expect fast replies, straight talk, and genuine care from first idea to launch and beyond.

values.title: One Fixed Price. No Surprises.
values.description: You know exactly what you are paying before we start. No hidden extras, no surprise invoices. Got a quote from another company? We will beat it.

process.subheading: Tell us your idea and we will take it from there.

steps.title: Tell Us Your Idea
steps.description: Fill in the form and describe your idea in plain words.

steps.title: We Send You a Quote
steps.description: We review your idea and send you an estimated cost range and a potential implementation plan.

steps.title: You Review the Proposal
steps.description: You review the proposal and we schedule a consultation meeting online or offline to discuss further details.

steps.title: We Shake Hands
steps.description: When you are ready to start, we sign a simple contract to get everything in writing.

steps.title: We Start the Work
steps.description: You pay the deposit and we get building. Easy as that.

ctaStrip.heading: Not sure if your idea is ready?
ctaStrip.body1: That is exactly when to talk to us. Fill in the form with details about your idea and we will give you feedback.
ctaStrip.body2: With in-house experience in Design Thinking and MVP, we help you validate your idea before committing to a full build.

contact.heading: Tell Us Your Idea
contact.body: Fill in the form with as much detail as you can. The more you share, the more accurate your quote and plan will be.
